label: Study Planner Agent
description: An adaptive study planning agent that transforms any learning goal (vague or structured) into a personalized weekly plan with curated resources. Interviews users to clarify vague goals, searches for real learning resources, and adapts plans based on assessment results.

skills.name: goal_clarification
skills.description: Interviews users to clarify vague learning goals before generating a plan
skills.input: Natural language learning goal (e.g. 'I want to learn cooking')
skills.output: Clarifying questions or a structured study plan

skills.name: plan_generation
skills.description: Generates a structured weekly study plan with topics and learning objectives
skills.output: Weekly plan with topics, objectives, and curated resources

skills.name: plan_adaptation
skills.description: Adapts the study plan based on assessment results from the Test/Teacher Agent
skills.output: Updated study plan (advance / add resources / restructure)

skills.name: resource_search
skills.description: Searches YouTube and web for real learning resources per topic
skills.output: List of curated resources with titles and URLs
